title: tina mango grove becomes gummy ocean
prompt: Use Image 1 as the edit target. Preserve Tina, identity, wardrobe, pose, pink gummy, package, car interior, camera and foreground. Image 2 is supporting identity and product reference only. Transform the panorama outside the window through one continuous visual rhyme. At frame left the street has become a luminous mango grove with glowing fruit among dark green branches. Across the view the same composition gradually becomes an underwater kelp forest where each mango becomes an orange gummy fish and each branch becomes flowing kelp. The transition has no hard portal edge. Colored light and caustics move across Tina face. Elegant world-transition study, cinematic, tropical jewel palette, no collage borders, no cartoon mascots, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
